title: Fix package.json main/module/build scripts
description: package.json:32 main is dist/index.js (does not exist — only dist/index.cjs is built). package.json:33 module points to src/smithery-minimal.ts (.ts not resolvable by Node ESM). Also package.json:42 build and :43 build:node are 100% identical — both produce dist/index.cjs. Fix: set main to dist/index.cjs; remove module (or point to dist/stdio-server.mjs); remove the duplicate build:node script (alias build → build:node if needed).
validation: Verify main: dist/index.cjs, no dead module field, no duplicate build:node.
